# WanaIQ (ama)

> Civic accountability and action platform empowering citizens through community discussions, government transparency, and issue reporting.

WanaIQ is an AI-powered civic engagement platform. Citizens follow representatives, track campaign promises, discuss local issues, and hold institutions accountable. The platform is independent and non-governmental.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Personalized civic feed of posts, projects, and promises.
- [Communities](/communities): Directory of geographic and interest-based civic communities.
- [Officials](/officials): Government officials, offices, and verified representatives.
- [Projects](/projects): Public infrastructure and civic accountability projects.
- [Discover](/discover): Trending civic content and communities.
- [Explore](/explore): Overview of platform features and civic tools.
- [Civic Clips](/civic-clips): Short-form video content from citizens and officials.
- [Civic Assistant](/civic-assistant): AI assistant for civic questions.
- [Quests](/quests): Civic engagement challenges.
- [Leaderboards](/leaderboards): Top contributors and communities.

## Optional

- [Install](/install): How to install the WanaIQ app.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](/terms)
